message:
test(renderer): add 38 edge-case tests for grid geometry and scale normalization (bd-yxx1a)

Cover normalized_scale boundaries (NaN/Inf/negative/zero/clamp), grid_geometry
edge cases (zero dims, extreme DPR/zoom), fit_grid_to_container (tiny/exact),
RendererConfig defaults, RendererError Display, CellData attribute encoding,
CellPatch construction, CursorStyle exhaustive, InteractionUniforms, FrameStats.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
